meta.title: The Wedding of Danish & Intan
meta.description: Join us as we celebrate the wedding of Muhammad Danish Fikri & Intan Kamilia.

gifts.heading: Gifts
gifts.intro: Your presence is the only gift we need — but if you'd like to bring something more, state it below so everyone can see what's already covered and nothing overlaps.
gifts.confirmSimilar: {{name}} already listed “{{gift}}” — that looks similar to yours. Add it anyway?

gifts.listEmpty: No gifts listed yet — be the first!

wishes.heading: Wishes
wishes.intro: Leave a message of love and well wishes for the couple — and read what other guests have shared below.
wishes.messagePlaceholder: e.g. Wishing you a lifetime of love and happiness!
